title: cyperus sandwicensis
intro: Cyperus sandwicensis, also known as the Hawaiian flat sedge or alae, is a type of aquatic plant native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus sandwicensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or poultices for topical application, and is often used in traditional Hawaiian medicine to treat various ailments.
